signature.citation: Curated consensus AD brain transcriptomic signature (up = reactive glia / microglial activation / complement, down = synaptic / neuronal), after Zhang et al. 2013 (Cell 153:707; TYROBP causal network), Mathys et al. 2019 (Nature 570:332; single-cell AD), and Mostafavi et al. 2018 (Nat Neurosci 21:811). APPROXIMATION — not a single-study DE table.

validation.name: efficacy_vs_drugs

gold_citations.ACHE: FDA labels: donepezil (Aricept), rivastigmine (Exelon), galantamine (Razadyne) — acetylcholinesterase inhibitors
gold_citations.BCHE: FDA label: rivastigmine (Exelon) — also inhibits butyrylcholinesterase
gold_citations.APP: FDA labels: lecanemab (Leqembi), aducanumab (Aduhelm), donanemab (Kisunla) — anti-amyloid-beta (APP/Abeta)
gold_citations.GRIN1: FDA label: memantine (Namenda) — NMDA-receptor (GRIN subunit) antagonist
